slashCommands.modelDesc: Select model, thinking mode and effort control
slashCommands.initDesc: Initialize an AGENTS.md file with instructions for LLM
slashCommands.resumeDesc: Pick a previous conversation to continue
slashCommands.continueDesc: Continue the active conversation or pick one to resume
slashCommands.undoDesc: Restore code and/or conversation to a previous point
slashCommands.mcpDesc: Show MCP server status and available tools
slashCommands.rawDesc: Toggle display mode for viewing or collapsing reasoning content
